description: Product Description Activated charcoal is known to help remove stains & absorb toxins. Keeps your teeth enamel strong and healthy, effectively helps prevent caries and decay, and protects against acid attacks. Gentle, effective and promotes optimal oral hygiene. Naturally whitens teeth, balances pH in the mouth, eliminates bad breath. Cleans and whitens teeth removing unwanted coffee and tea stains. Mouthwash helps eliminate bacteria causing bad breath and neutralises remaining odours, leaving your breath feeling fresh all day. Activated charcoal offers high performance whitening boost that makes mouthwash safe for daily use. Leaves the mouth with a fresh fragrance, ensures hassle free brushing. Brush thoroughly, at least twice a day, preferably after each meal or as directed by a doctor or physician. Directions STORE COOL PLACE Safety Warning For External Use only See more
